statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // "Claude"'); tokens=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.conversation.tokens_remaining // ""'); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // ""'); style=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.output_style.name // "default"'); dir_name=$(basename "$dir" 2>/dev/null || echo "~"); git_info=""; k8s=""; if git -C "$dir" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$dir" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then status=$(git -C "$dir" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); ind=""; echo "$status" | grep -q "^[MADRC]" && ind="${ind}+"; echo "$status" | grep -q "^.[MD]" && ind="${ind}*"; echo "$status" | grep -q "^??" && ind="${ind}?"; [ -n "$ind" ] && git_info=" ${branch}${ind}" || git_info=" ${branch}"; fi; fi; ctx=$(kubectl config current-context 2>/dev/null | cut -d'/' -f2 | cut -d'_' -f2- 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$ctx" ] && k8s="⎈ ${ctx} "; printf "\033[38;5;117m%s\033[0m" "$dir_name"; [ -n "$git_info" ] && printf " \033[38;5;114m%s\033[0m" "$git_info"; printf " \033[38;5;244m│\033[0m "; printf "\033[38;5;213m%s\033[0m" "$model"; [ -n "$tokens" ] && [ "$tokens" != "null" ] && printf " \033[38;5;244m│\033[0m \033[38;5;179m%s\033[0m" "${tokens}t"; [ -n "$k8s" ] && printf " \033[38;5;244m│\033[0m \033[38;5;75m%s\033[0m" "$k8s"; [ "$style" != "default" ] && [ "$style" != "null" ] && printf " \033[38;5;244m│\033[0m \033[38;5;222m%s\033[0m" "$style"; printf "\n"
